shortAnswer: Neutrophils are the most common type of white blood cell and mainly fight bacterial infections. Elevated values often indicate an acute infection or inflammation, low values can increase infection risk. The value is always considered together with the rest of the blood count.
metaDescription: Neutrophils elevated or low? Meaning and causes explained simply.
doctorQuestions: Does my neutrophil count indicate a bacterial infection?
Is my infection risk currently elevated?
